markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Corbin Carroll records 1+ hits in the Arizona vs Miami professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 11, 2026 at 1:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Corbin Carroll is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Corbin Carroll starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Corbin Carroll is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Corbin Carroll is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Corbin Carroll: 1+ hits?
